practicals.title: Map Reading: Locate major tectonic plates
practicals.details: Locate major tectonic plates on a world map.

practicals.title: Map Reading: Locate physiographic regions and climatic zones
practicals.details: Locate physiographic regions of India and climatic zones on a globe/map.

practicals.title: Map Reading: Locate biosphere reserves
practicals.details: Locate biosphere reserves on the map of India.

practicals.title: Graphing: Represent climatic data
practicals.details: Represent climatic data (temperature, rainfall) through appropriate graphs, charts, or diagrams.

practicals.title: Graphing: Analyse GDP and trade trends
practicals.details: Use visual tools including maps, pie charts, and graphs to analyse data on GDP, trade, and sectoral trends.

practicals.title: Data Analysis: Income, Capital, Poverty
practicals.details: Gather and analyse data related to income, capital, poverty, and employment from Census or NITI Aayog reports.

activities.title: Investigate causes of forest fires and prepare mitigation plan
activities.unit_name: Resistance and sovereignty: Resilience (1000 CE – 1700 CE)
activities.details: Investigate the causes of forest fires in the local area, and prepare a plan for mitigation and prevention.

activities.title: Prepare simple personal or family budget
activities.unit_name: Smart Ways to Manage Your Finances (6 Hours)
activities.chapter_name: Smart Ways to Manage Your Finances (6 Hours)
activities.details: Prepare a simple personal or family budget showing income, expenditure, and savings.

activities.title: Role-play: Running a lemonade stall / Simulating circular flow of income
activities.details: Run a lemonade stall or simulate the circular flow of income with students acting as households, firms, banks, and government to make ideas like production, income, and expenditure tangible.

activities.title: Classroom budget preparation game
activities.details: Engage in classroom activities and games like preparing a classroom budget to understand scarcity, choice, and opportunity cost.

activities.title: Field visit to local shopkeepers or MSMEs
activities.details: Conduct surveys and field visits to expose students to real market dynamics.

activities.title: Analyze inscriptions or edicts
activities.details: Analyze inscriptions (e.g., Ashoka's edicts, Gupta records) to understand how rulers communicated policies and ethical guidelines.

activities.title: Research on forts, temples, mosques, and palaces
activities.details: Conduct research to present examples of cultural, architectural, and political developments in Indian history.

activities.title: Locate extent of empires on a world map
activities.details: Use a world map to trace India's trade and cultural exchanges with other civilisations.

activities.title: Document-based inquiry on Vedic texts or constitutional excerpts
activities.details: Explore authentic sources to interpret historical contexts and moral reasoning.

activities.title: Visual organiser creation (charts, tables, concept maps)
activities.details: Convert complex political ideas into structured visuals to support comprehension.

activities.title: Construct models or sketches of ocean relief
activities.details: Create three-dimensional models to visualise complex geographical processes like mountain formation, river systems, and soil profiles.

activities.title: Field observation of local landscapes
activities.details: Directly engage with local landscapes to develop geographical inquiry skills.

activities.title: Explore Bhuvan images for geospatial data
activities.details: Use India's indigenous satellite imagery to explore regions using real-time geospatial data.

activities.title: Photo interpretation of land-use patterns
activities.details: Analyse aerial and satellite photographs to understand land-use, vegetation cover, urbanisation, and environmental changes.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Field Visits and Report Writing
projects.details: Report writing on field visits, commentaries/visual interpretations, site-map making.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Heritage India Quiz and Achievements Portfolio
projects.details: Participation in activities like Heritage India quiz, portfolio of classroom work including reflections, narrations, journals.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Debate and Role Play on Democracy
projects.details: Debate, role play, viva-voce, group discussion to explore democratic values.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Visual Expression and Gallery Walks
projects.details: Visual expression, interactive bulletin boards, gallery walks.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Exit Cards and Concept Maps
projects.details: Exit cards, concept maps to assess understanding of democratic concepts.

projects.title: Interdisciplinary Project: Peer and Self Assessment
projects.details: Peer assessment, self-assessment on democratic processes.
